title: Gingered Crumble Tarts
description: A twist on traditional Thai desserts, these Gingered Crumble Tarts combine the warmth of ginger with the sweetness of pomegranate and the crunch of crumbly pastry.
instructions: Roll out the tart crust and place in a tart pan.
Fill the tart crust with pomegranate seeds.
Roll out the gingered pastry and cut into small pieces.
Place the pastry pieces on top of the pomegranate seeds.
Mix together the ginger syrup and powdered sugar.
Pour the ginger syrup mixture over the pastry pieces.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
